task_completion.description: LibreOffice Impress is opened with the api_docs_v2.odp presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Impress window is visible with 'api_docs_v2.odp' in the title bar.

task_completion.description: A new slide is added at the end of the presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slides pane on the left shows 3 slides, with the 3rd slide selected or being edited.

task_completion.description: The title of the new slide is set to 'API Response Structure'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title text box on the new slide contains the exact text 'API Response Structure'.

task_completion.description: The JSON content from json_snippet.txt is pasted into a text box on the new slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box on the new slide contains JSON text, specifically including the keys/values 'user_id', 'usr_8742_x9', and 'sysadmin'.

task_completion.description: The JSON text is formatted with a monospace font.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the JSON text box appears fixed-width (monospaced), or the font dropdown in the toolbar shows a monospace font name like 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier', 'Consolas', or 'DejaVu Sans Mono'.

task_completion.description: The text box containing the JSON has a light gray background.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The background area inside the text box containing the JSON is filled with a light gray color (similar to #EEEEEE).

task_completion.description: The text box containing the JSON has a solid black border.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is a visible, solid black line outlining the text box that contains the JSON content.

task_completion.description: The presentation is saved after making the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save icon in the toolbar does not indicate unsaved changes (e.g., no red dot on the save icon, no asterisk in the title bar), or a save action (Ctrl+S or clicking Save) is visible in the trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Impress GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Impress interface (menus, toolbars, slide pane) rather than terminal commands modifying the .odp file directly.

integrity.description: The agent opened and copied the JSON content from the actual file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/json_snippet.txt' before it is pasted into Impress.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter or delete the existing slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: The first two slides remain intact in the slides pane and were not deleted or visibly modified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation is located at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/api_docs_v2.odp and initially has 2 slides. The new slide must be the 3rd slide. The title must be exactly 'API Response Structure'. The JSON content must include 'user_id', 'usr_8742_x9', and 'sysadmin'. The font must be monospaced (e.g., Liberation Mono, Courier New, Consolas, Courier, Monospace, or DejaVu Sans Mono). The text box background should be light gray (#EEEEEE) and have a solid black border.
